name: off_track_structural_poor
notes: The functional clauses ARE all met — every done_when item has real evidence — but the shape drift is severe: App.tsx is a 1827-LOC god object doing pipeline + contacts + accounts + auth + everything else, and the reviewer graded structural_health=poor with specific file:line concerns. A well-behaved evaluator returns off_track and lists the structural items as corrections. Even if the model returns achieved anyway (functional axis passed → tempting), validate() must mechanically downgrade because structural_health=poor at the done-gate.

goal.objective: Ship the pipeline board UI: drag-drop stage transitions, contact list, account details view. Wire to existing backend API.
goal.done_when: The pipeline view supports drag-drop between stages persisted via POST /pipeline/move. Contact list renders and filters. Account detail view renders the contact/deal timeline. Tests cover the drag-drop hook and the account view.
backlog: render contact list with client-side filter

status.next: run the done-gate review and evaluate

inputs.recent_log: PR #19–#22 merged into main. Each PR added the requested feature but stacked its handlers into App.tsx rather than creating a feature dir.
inputs.deliveries:
Four PRs merged:
- #19 pipeline drag-drop wired
- #20 contact list + filter
- #21 account detail view
- #22 timeline component
inputs.review_report:
## Per-clause evidence
- clause: `The pipeline view supports drag-drop between stages persisted via POST /pipeline/move` — satisfied. src/App.tsx:432 usePipelineDrag() + POST call landed; tests/hooks/usePipelineDrag.test.ts green.
- clause: `Contact list renders and filters` — satisfied. src/App.tsx:889 ContactsList component + client-side filter; tests/components/ContactsList.test.tsx green.
- clause: `Account detail view renders the contact/deal timeline` — satisfied. src/App.tsx:1240 AccountDetail component wraps Timeline (src/App.tsx:1502).
- clause: `Tests cover the drag-drop hook and the account view` — satisfied. tests/hooks/usePipelineDrag.test.ts + tests/components/AccountDetail.test.tsx both present + green.

## Structural health
verdict: poor. Specific concerns:
- src/App.tsx has grown to 1827 lines and now owns pipeline + contacts + accounts + auth + activities in one file. Should be decomposed into src/features/{pipeline,contacts,accounts}/*View.tsx feature folders.
- src/App.tsx:1502 Timeline is defined inline inside AccountDetail. Should be extracted to src/features/accounts/Timeline.tsx with its own tests.
- src/App.tsx:889 ContactsList imports and mutates a shared `contacts` mutable ref instead of using useState — race-prone; should own its own state or accept a controlled prop.

## Risks not in done_when
none material — but the shape drift compounds with every future feature merged into App.tsx.

expected.notes: Functional clauses all pass; structural_health=poor with three specific named items. The correct verdict is off_track with the structural items as corrections. If the model returns achieved (because clauses ARE all satisfied), validate() must downgrade because structural_health=poor at the done-gate — closes the closeloop-D1/D2/D6 shape-drift failure mode.

canned_model_output.rationale: Every done_when clause has evidence in the review. The model incorrectly ignores the structural axis; validate() must catch this.

src/App.tsx:1502 — Timeline is defined inline inside AccountDetail; extract to src/features/accounts/Timeline.tsx with its own tests.
src/App.tsx:889 — ContactsList mutates a shared `contacts` mutable ref instead of useState; own state or accept a controlled prop.
